title: AI Tsunami: How Artificial Intelligence is Overwhelming Scientific Journals
description: The use of AI in scientific paper submissions has surged by 42% since ChatGPT's release, leading to a decline in writing quality, a study reveals. Organization Science journal reports increased AI-generated content, straining the peer-review system and offering minimal writing benefits for non-native English authors.
content: Since the release of ChatGPT in late 2022, there has been a 42% increase in the use of artificial intelligence (AI) in submissions to a major academic journal, a new study reveals. The rise in AI-generated content has been associated with a decline i... [722 chars]

title: Report on OpenAI expected from privacy watchdogs today
description: Privacy watchdogs plan to release a report today on OpenAI, the company behind the popular artificial intelligence-powered chatbot ChatGPT.
content:
OTTAWA — Privacy watchdogs plan to release a report today on OpenAI, the company behind the popular artificial intelligence-powered chatbot ChatGPT.

title: Motion: Jasmin Lau on artificial intelligence transition with no jobless growth
description: Singapore cannot slow down the development of AI but it will not leave its outcomes to chance. The government will work hard to secure a different deal - between the companies that prosper here and the workers whose effort makes that prosperity possible. title: IIT Guwahati Launches MTech In Robotics And AI, GATE Scores Not Required
description: The MTech in Robotics and Artificial Intelligence programme is that a GATE score is not mandatory for admission. Candidates will be selected based on written test and interview.
content:
The MTech in Robotics and Artificial Intelligence programme is that a GATE score is not mandatory for admission. Candidates will be selected based on written test and interview.

title: Florida tragedies highlight risks of chatbots' friendly suggestions
description: Artificial intelligence chatbots are readily available while the rest of the world sleeps, but some of their advice has been part of tragic outcomes.
content:
Several Florida cases have raised alarms about the potential dangers of artificial intelligence chatbots.
Psychologists warn that current AI models lack the scientific evidence and regulations to ensure user safety.
